hero.heading: Pan dulce, conchas, y café — fresh from 5 AM.
hero.subheading: A Glendale Mexican bakery on Colorado Street baking conchas, marranitos, bolillos and tres leches the way they should be. Open from breakfast to almost bedtime.

about.heading: De la familia, para la mesa.
paragraphs: Flor De Cafe is the Hernández family bakery — Doña Rosa started it on Colorado Street in 2008 with three trays of pan dulce and a borrowed espresso machine. Today her sons Luis and Mario run the morning shift; she still rolls the bolillos at 5 AM.

Every concha is hand-shaped, scored with the shell pattern by hand, and baked in our original ovens. Café de olla brewed with cinnamon and piloncillo, hot chocolate spun on a molinillo, all-day breakfast on the weekends.
Open 7 AM to 9 PM. Cash discount. We accept orders for tres leches, quinceañera cakes, and Día de los Muertos pan de muerto — call two days ahead.

services.title: Pan Dulce Surtido
services.description: The morning selection — conchas (rosa, café y blanca), marranitos, cuernos, polvorones, orejas, empanadas de calabaza. Sold by the piece or by the bag.

services.title: Café de Olla
services.description: Slow-simmered with stick cinnamon, cloves, and piloncillo. Served hot in a clay mug for here or a cup to go. Refills $1.

services.title: Tres Leches Cake
services.description: Soaked sponge with three milks (evaporada, condensada, crema), crowned with cinnamon whipped cream. Slice or whole, made fresh daily.

services.title: Bolillo & Telera
services.description: Crusty white rolls baked twice a day. Telera for tortas, bolillo for everything else. Pick up warm if you get here before 11.

services.title: Pastel de Quinceañera
services.description: Custom multi-tier celebration cakes — tres leches, chantilly strawberry, chocoflan, or rosca. Two-day notice. We sketch with you.

services.title: Tamales y Atole
services.description: Saturdays and Sundays from open till sold out — rojo, verde, dulce de fresa, plus champurrado and atole de arroz to warm the morning.

reviews.name: Lupe G.
reviews.text: My family has been coming here for 12 years. The conchas are exactly how Mami used to bring them home — soft, sweet, perfect with the café de olla.

reviews.name: Ramon V.
reviews.text: Best tres leches in Glendale. They give you a generous slice and the cinnamon cream is real, not the squirty stuff. Worth every dollar.

reviews.name: Jessica T.
reviews.text: Ordered a quinceañera cake — three tiers, custom roses, drove from Burbank to pick it up. Beautiful, tasted even better.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Flor De Cafe Bakery 537 E Colorado St Glendale CA 91205

seo.title: Flor De Cafe Bakery — Mexican panadería in Glendale
seo.description: Mexican bakery on Colorado St serving fresh conchas, pan dulce, tres leches, café de olla and custom celebration cakes. Open 7 AM – 9 PM.
